tagline: We Make It Easy to Own a Pool

hero.headline: 30+ Years Keeping Dallas Pools Crystal Clear
hero.subheadline: Hayden Pool Service combines cutting-edge water chemistry technology with three decades of hands-on expertise. Your pool deserves the precision care that only certified professionals can deliver.
checkmarks: WaterLink Spin Touch computer-tested water balance

services.headline: Complete Pool Care Solutions
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full renovations, we handle every aspect of pool ownership so you can simply enjoy your backyard oasis.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Computer-tested water chemistry using WaterLink Spin Touch technology ensures precise balance every single week — no guesswork, no damage.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Fast, expert diagnosis and repair backed by partnerships with Pentair, Hayward, and Zodiac for genuine parts and reliable fixes.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: CPI-certified inspections for buyers, sellers, and homeowners. Identify hidden problems before they become expensive emergencies.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Surface refinishing, equipment upgrades, and modernization that extend the life and beauty of your pool investment.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Advanced computer-based testing eliminates chemical imbalances that cause staining, scaling, and premature equipment failure.

cards.title: Seasonal Maintenance
cards.description: Spring openings, winterization, and storm recovery services keep your pool protected and ready year-round in the Texas climate.

steps.title: Schedule Your Assessment
steps.description: Call or request a visit online. We'll come out within 24-48 hours to evaluate your pool's condition and equipment.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Plan
steps.description: We'll recommend the right service package based on your pool's size, equipment age, and your family's usage patterns.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Sit back while our certified team handles everything — consistent, reliable service you can count on week after week.

about.label: About Hayden Pool Service
about.headline: Three Decades of Dallas Pool Expertise
about.description: Founded in 1994 by Jamie Hayden, we built our reputation one pool at a time through consistency, reliability, and genuine care for our customers. Today we combine modern technology like WaterLink Spin Touch testing with a lifetime of hands-on experience to deliver results other companies simply cannot match. As a CARECRAFT member with CPO and CPI certifications, we hold ourselves to the highest industry standards.

features.title: Certified Industry Partners
features.description: Pentair, Hayward, Zodiac & PoolCorp certified partners ensuring quality parts and expert service on every brand.

features.title: Computer-Based Water Testing
features.description: WaterLink Spin Touch technology delivers lab-accurate chemistry results in 60 seconds on every single visit.

features.title: State Regulated & Licensed
features.description: Regulated by the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation (TICL# 241) for your protection and peace of mind.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pool Care Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no surprise charges. Get a custom quote based on your pool's specific needs and size.

guarantee.headline: Our 30-Year Reputation Guarantee
guarantee.description: We've spent over three decades building trust with Dallas families. If you're ever unsatisfied with our service, we'll return within 24 hours to make it right — no questions asked. Your pool and your peace of mind are our priority.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: We typically schedule initial assessments within 24-48 hours of your call. Once we've evaluated your pool, weekly service can begin as soon as the following week.

faqs.question: What makes your water testing different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: We use WaterLink Spin Touch computer-based chemistry testing — the same technology used by commercial aquatic facilities. This eliminates guesswork and provides lab-accurate results in 60 seconds, preventing chemical imbalances that damage surfaces and equipment.

faqs.question: Do you service pools with older equipment?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. As certified partners with Pentair, Hayward, Zodiac, and PoolCorp, we can service, repair, or upgrade virtually any pool equipment regardless of age or brand.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in the Dallas Metroplex?
faqs.answer: We serve Dallas, Plano, Park Cities, Frisco, Preston Hollow, Richardson, Farmers Branch, and surrounding areas throughout the Dallas Metroplex.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team holds CPO (Certified Pool Operator) and CPI (Certified Pool Inspector) certifications. We're also a CARECRAFT member and regulated by the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation (TICL# 241).

testimonials.name: Richard S.
testimonials.text: Hayden Pools has been our 'Go to' company. Jamie Hayden and his staff are always quick to respond and usually within 24-48 hours which is unheard of these days.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: This is an excellent local business run by knowledgeable people who really care about their customers. Scheduling is easy and efficient, and the technicians are always prompt, friendly, and helpful.

testimonials.name: David L.
testimonials.text: We have used Hayden Pools for over 5 years. Their technicians are very reliable. They have never not shown up on the day they are supposed to service.

contact.headline: Ready for Worry-Free Pool Ownership?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch today and discover why Dallas families have trusted us for over 30 years.
benefits: Customized service plan for your pool

footer.description: Hayden Pool Service has proudly served the Dallas Metroplex since 1994, delivering reliable, technology-driven pool care backed by 30+ years of expertise and industry-leading certifications.
footer.service_area: Serving Dallas, Plano, Park Cities, Frisco, Preston Hollow, Richardson, Farmers Branch, and surrounding areas
